name: Goblin Ambush · D&D 5e
summary: A dusk forest path; a goblin leaps from the shrubs. You command three adventurers and take it down by D&D 5e rules.

startup.opening_scene:
[Goblin Ambush · D&D 5e]

A forest path at dusk. You lead three adventurers — Aldric (Fighter), Bree (Rogue), Merrin (Wizard) — through the woods.

The shrubs shudder. A goblin springs out brandishing a scimitar, yellow eyes glinting in the gloom.

This is an encounter: you command these three and fight by D&D 5e rules — roll initiative, d20 to hit, roll damage, and put the goblin down. There's only one, but don't get careless: goblins are slippery and will flee when the tide turns.

Initiative begins.
opening_choices: First, check the three adventurers' status
